t.t-esc: state.dashboard and state.dashboard.subtitle or 'Real-time monitoring interface'

div.div: Unlock custom filters and advanced animations.

t.p: No widgets yet. Use the buttons on the left to add some.

t.label: KPI Value
t.p: 💡 Tip: Double-click the value in the widget to edit inline

t.label: Text Content
t.p: 💡 Tip: Double-click the text in the widget to edit inline

div.p: Apply color rules based on data values

t.p: Select a widget to customize its properties
